info.name: SaaS API
info.description:
Complete NestJS multi-tenant SaaS API.

Setup:
1. Import `api.environment.json` as environment
2. Select 'SaaS API - Local' as active environment
3. Run **Register** or **Login** — tokens are saved automatically
4. All protected endpoints use `{{access_token}}` from the environment

request.description: Creates a new tenant (company) and an OWNER user. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Authenticates a user and returns access + refresh tokens.
Uses the refresh token to issue a new access + refresh token pair.
Returns the authenticated user data extracted from the JWT.
Returns all users for the current tenant. Requires owner-level permission.
Deactivates a user. Cannot deactivate yourself.
Returns all pending invitations for the current tenant.
Sends an invitation email to a new user.
Creates a user account from an invitation token. No authentication required.
Returns the company profile of the current tenant.
Uploads a logo (PNG, JPG, WebP — max 2 MB). Normalized and stored as PNG.
Returns employees with pagination. Filter by department, status, or search term.
Returns asset by ID with assignments.
Assigns asset to a project or employee.
Searches customers by name, identification number, contact person, or company.
Searches prospects by name, identification number, contact person, or company.
Returns quotations with pagination. Excludes line items.
Returns quotation data by ID including line items.
Generates and downloads the quotation as a PDF.
Transitions quotation from DRAFT to SENT.
Transitions quotation from SENT to ACCEPTED.
Transitions quotation from SENT to REJECTED.
Removes the quotation. Only DRAFT quotations can be deleted.
Returns sales with pagination. Excludes line items.
Returns sale by ID with line items.
Generates and downloads the sale order as a PDF.
Transitions sale from PENDING to APPROVED. Auto-creates invoice.
Returns invoice by ID with line items.
Generates and downloads the invoice as a PDF.
Transitions invoice from DRAFT to SENT.
Transitions invoice from SENT to PAID.
Cancels a DRAFT or SENT invoice.
Creates a project within the tenant.
Returns a project with its members.
Updates project details. Replaces members array entirely.
Removes a project from the tenant.
Generates and downloads the payroll entry as a pay stub PDF.
Marks a payroll entry as paid.
Returns transactions with pagination and optional date/type filters.
Generates and downloads the transaction as a receipt PDF.
Records a manual inventory movement. type: ENTRY | EXIT | TRANSFER. toWarehouseId required for TRANSFER.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Acme Supplies Co.",
  "email": "sales@acme-supplies.com",
  "phone": "+1-555-0300",
  "company": "Acme Supplies",
  "identificationNumber": "TAX-SUP-001",
  "address": "999 Supply Ave, Metropolis",
  "contactPerson": "Jane Smith"
}

request.description: Creates a new supplier prospect that can later be converted to a supplier.
Returns supplier prospect data by ID.
Creates a new draft purchase request.
Returns purchase request data by ID.
Transitions purchase request from DRAFT to PENDING_REVIEW.
Transitions from PENDING_REVIEW to APPROVED. Auto-creates a purchase order.
Returns purchase order data by ID.
Marks the purchase order as RECEIVED. Triggers inventory ENTRY movement.
Marks the purchase order as CANCELLED.
Manually creates a supplier invoice for a purchase order.
Returns paginated supplier invoices with optional filters.
Returns a supplier invoice by ID.
Transitions the invoice status to PAID.
Transitions the invoice status to OVERDUE.
